content:
守密人可将作品按投稿要求发布在官方Discord、Facebook、巴哈姆特、X或YouTube等任意社群平台。
🔹发布作品后请把连接填到下方问卷，才能参与后续评选和发奖：https://wj.qookkagames.com/p/4EQMU6uB

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

Each keeper can publish your work on any social platform such as the official Discord, Facebook, X, Bahamut or YouTube according to the submission requirements.

🔹After publishing your work, please fill in the link in the questionnaire below to participate in the subsequent selection and awarding :https://wj.qookkagames.com/p/4EQMU6uB
🔹V2.3.0 Announcement: https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1395758098781831249

content:
The endgame is all about clearing mobs. And his kit doesn't really help with that - so I don't see how I can use him endgame. Especially when lowest health enemies spawn with barrier - which is in almost every level this dtide.

Could you please update his exalt to:

Attack the lowest health enemy. Any overkill (excess damage) is spread as bleed damage to all enemies.

Example: Lowest enemy 1000 health. Doresain does 3000 dmg. The extra 2000 damage is spread as bleed damage to all other enemies. 

This matches his bloody banquet persona.  And then I can actually use him endgame and not just get destroyed by mobs turn 2.
